seo.title: Frequently Asked Questions | Y2Mate.vc
seo.meta_description: Find answers to common questions about Y2Mate.vc, including usage, supported formats, safety, limits, and common issues when processing YouTube content.

intro: This FAQ page covers common questions related to using Y2Mate.vc.
If you are unsure whether to download video or audio, or encounter issues during use, the information below may help.

items.question: What is Y2Mate.vc?
items.answer: Y2Mate.vc is a web-based technical tool that allows users to process publicly accessible YouTube links to download videos or extract audio.

items.question: Do I need to create an account to use the service?
items.answer: No. Y2Mate.vc does not require account registration or login.

items.question: Which formats are supported?
items.answer: Depending on the tool used, Y2Mate.vc supports video downloads (MP4), audio extraction (MP3), and downloading YouTube Shorts in vertical format.

items.question: Should I choose MP4 or MP3?
items.answer: Choose MP4 if you need the video with visuals. Choose MP3 if you only need the audio, such as music or spoken content.

items.question: Why are some videos unavailable for download?
items.answer: Videos that are private, restricted, or not publicly accessible on YouTube cannot be processed.

items.question: Is it safe to use Y2Mate.vc?
items.answer: Yes. The service runs entirely in the browser, does not require software installation, and does not collect personal information.

items.question: Are there any download limits?
items.answer: Y2Mate.vc does not enforce a fixed limit on the number of downloads during normal usage.

items.question: How should downloaded content be used?
items.answer: Downloaded content is intended for personal use. Users are responsible for respecting the rights of original content creators.

footer_note: If your question is not answered here, please visit our Contact page to reach us.
